untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern height and width measurements (peak-to-confirmation ratios, highest-high comparisons to median length) which cannot be expressed using the available indicators. These metrics require historical pattern structure analysis and custom statistical calculations not available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators do not support measuring inter-peak distances, relative peak heights, or pattern-specific geometric properties.
translation_notes: BULKOWSKI_DRY_0 is a pattern recognition rule based on Bulkowski's size-related performance analysis. The core logic (tall vs. wide patterns relative to medians) requires custom pattern detection. Provided a directional pivot-based placeholder, but this does NOT capture the intended pattern mechanics. Manual pattern detection or custom indicator development required for proper implementation.
